trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price holds above $37.00 and 1h candle closes bullish from $36.61 support or EMA20 ($37.89)
confluence_signals: Strong overall bullish trend (24h/7d returns, 1d channel up)
Bullish EMA alignment (price above all EMAs)
OI rising with price rising (healthy trend continuation)
Price falling with LOW volume (weak selling) - bullish divergence
FEAR_AND_GREED_INDEX at Extreme Fear (contrarian buy signal)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Four strong bullish signals (trend, EMA, OI, volume divergence) indicate a high probability of a bounce within the established uptrend. The Extreme Fear FGI adds a macro contrarian buy component. Countered by short-term bearish MACD, but overall confluence favors long, leading to a 68% win rate.

Conflicting strong signals: extreme long crowd and rising OI with falling price suggest bearish conviction, but price falling with low volume indicates weak selling pressure. This creates an unclear directional bias.
The provided KEY_PRICE_LEVELS (Resistance and Support at $0.02 while current price is $0.0178) are inconsistent and unusable for defining precise entry, stop loss, and profit targets.
